name: Product Launch Poster
description: A premium launch or announcement poster with one hero message, one product story, and a crisp CTA.
usage: Use for launch announcements, waitlist pushes, product campaigns, and single-offer promotional posters.
best_for: Launch announcements, waitlist pushes, product campaigns, and single-offer promotional posters.
Briefs that need one memorable headline, one hero subject, and a publishable artboard.
avoid_for: Long educational content with many steps or sections.
Detailed product specs that require comparison tables.
layout_rules: Choose a fixed poster ratio early, usually 1080x1350 or 1080x1920 unless specified.
Use one dominant hero zone, one headline cluster, one support-copy cluster, and one CTA cluster.
Keep strong safe margins and use asymmetric balance.
If there is a product image, treat it as the composition anchor.
style_rules: Use a confident campaign palette: one deep primary, one light neutral, one sharp accent.
Use large display type, tight copy blocks, crisp borders, and subtle depth.
Create premium texture only when it supports the product.
Keep all readable copy in HTML text.
content_rules: Headline should state the launch promise or product moment.
Limit secondary copy to credible launch details.
Use the CTA as a concrete next action.
Do not invent release dates, prices, metrics, awards, or partner names.
quality_checks: At thumbnail size, the headline and hero subject should still be identifiable.
The poster must feel like one finished direction.
CTA and critical details must sit inside safe margins.
